title: Cannot compile osu018_stdcells.v: could we add support for table primitives please?
body:
Cannot compile osu018_stdcells.v, error messages:

```
$ verilator --sv --cc tech/osu018/osu018_stdcells.v
%Error: tech/osu018/osu018_stdcells.v:241:12: syntax error, unexpected '(', expecting IDENTIFIER or randomize
  241 |    udp_dff (DS0000, D, I0_CLOCK, 1'B0, 1'B0, NOTIFIER);
      |            ^
%Error: tech/osu018/osu018_stdcells.v:279:12: syntax error, unexpected '(', expecting IDENTIFIER or randomize
  279 |    udp_dff (DS0000, D, CLK, 1'B0, 1'B0, NOTIFIER);
      |            ^
%Error: tech/osu018/osu018_stdcells.v:321:12: syntax error, unexpected '(', expecting IDENTIFIER or randomize
  321 |    udp_dff (P0003, D_, CLK, I0_SET, I0_CLEAR, NOTIFIER);
      |            ^
%Error: tech/osu018/osu018_stdcells.v:552:13: syntax error, unexpected '(', expecting IDENTIFIER or randomize
  552 |    udp_tlat (DS0000, D, CLK, 1'B0, 1'B0, NOTIFIER);
      |             ^
%Error: tech/osu018/osu018_stdcells.v:591:13: syntax error, unexpected '(', expecting IDENTIFIER or randomize
  591 |    udp_mux2 (I0_out, B, A, S);
      |             ^
%Error: Exiting due to 5 error(s)

```

To reproduce:
- download osu018_stdcells.v from https://download.libresilicon.com/technologies/OSU018/
- `verilator --sv --cc osu018_stdcells.v`

Tested with version 4.218

Looking through https://verilator.org/guide/latest/languages.html , looks like the issue is that primitive tables are not currently supported. Dont suppose... could it be possible to add support for these, in order to enable gate-level simulation please? (verilator should be great for gate-level simulation, since verilator runs so fast :) ).
